hero.headline: Katrin's Studio
hero.subline: Reformer Pilates, TRX, and personal training in Afula, with one coach who pays close attention.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Training built around what your body actually needs, led by Katrin every session.

reformer.title: Pilates Reformer
reformer.description: Full-body work on 7 reformers. You'll feel the difference in your posture and core within weeks.

trx.title: TRX & Functional Training
trx.description: Suspension training using your own bodyweight. Builds functional strength, balance, and core stability.

personal.title: Personal Training
personal.description: One-on-one sessions built around your goals and schedule. Katrin adjusts every session as you get stronger.

group.title: Group Classes
group.description: Small groups, 8 people maximum. Enough energy to stay motivated, few enough that Katrin knows exactly where you are in your training.

about.title: A Studio Built on Passion and Precision
about.body1: Katrin Yair is a certified fitness trainer and Wingate graduate. She coaches every client herself, with expertise in reformer Pilates, TRX, strength training, and body sculpting.
about.body2: The studio is small on purpose. Whether it's your first session or you've been training for years, Katrin knows where you started and keeps pushing you forward.

whyUs.title: What Sets Us Apart?
whyUs.subtitle: Seven reformers, one dedicated coach, and members who keep coming back.

equipment.title: Professional Equipment
equipment.description: Seven Pilates reformers and full TRX setup. Everything you need, nothing you don't.

instructors.title: Expert Instructors
instructors.description: Katrin coaches every session herself. Not a rotating staff, one person who knows your body and your progress.

community.title: Welcoming Community
community.description: Most members have been coming for over a year. You'll understand why on your first visit.

cta.title: Want to Give It a Try?
cta.subtitle: Send us a message and we'll get back to you the same day.

testimonials.title: Real Results, Real Stories
testimonials.subtitle: From back pain relief to personal bests. Here's what members say.

1.name: Michal R.
1.body: I came to Katrin Studio after years of back pain. After just three months of reformer sessions my posture improved dramatically and the pain is almost gone. Katrin's personal guidance made all the difference.

2.name: Tal B.
2.body: I've tried many places before, but nothing compares to the experience here. The equipment is top-notch, the atmosphere is warm and welcoming, and someone truly cares about your progress. I've never felt stronger.

3.name: Noa S.
3.body: The small group classes are exactly what I was looking for. Intimate enough for personal attention but still fun and social. My core strength and flexibility improved beyond what I thought possible.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Leave your details and we'll get back to you within 24 hours to set up your first session.

blog.title: Fitness & Wellness Blog

blog.ctaTitle: Want to Give It a Try?
blog.ctaBody: Come train with Katrin at the studio in Afula.

faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.subtitle: Everything you wanted to know before your first class at our Afula studio.

location.question: Where is Katrin's Studio located?
location.answer: The studio is at HaMelacha 25, Floor 2, in Afula. We welcome members from across the Jezreel Valley, Afula, Migdal HaEmek, Nazareth, Kfar Tavor and the surrounding communities.

reformerVsMat.question: What's the difference between reformer and mat Pilates?
reformerVsMat.answer: Reformer Pilates uses a machine with a sliding carriage and spring resistance for controlled, varied exercises. Mat Pilates uses only body weight on a mat. Our studio specializes in reformer Pilates, which offers a wider range of exercises and personalized intensity.

beginners.question: Is Pilates suitable for beginners?
beginners.answer: Yes. Your first class includes a personal assessment with Katrin, adjustments to pace and difficulty, and the basic principles. No prior fitness background or special flexibility required.

prenatalPostnatal.question: Can I do Pilates postpartum or during pregnancy?
prenatalPostnatal.answer: Yes, with medical clearance. Pilates is one of the recommended methods for safe postpartum recovery and for staying fit and supporting posture during pregnancy. Katrin adapts each session to your stage and condition.

groupSize.question: How many people are in a group class?
groupSize.answer: Up to 8 participants per group class. Small enough for personal posture corrections, big enough for a fun, community atmosphere.

footer.tagline: Katrin's Studio. Pilates & fitness in Afula.
